---
title: "Arten von Unsicherheiten / Vagheiten"
subtitle: "Vagheiten"
lang: de
date: today
date-modified: last-modified
date-format: "DD.MM.YYYY"
css: /assets/css/collage.css
---
{{< include fragments/vague_definitions_intro.inc.qmd >}}


{{< include fragments/vague_definitions_vagueness.inc.qmd >}}


{{< include fragments/vague_definitions_uncertainty.inc.qmd >}}


{{< include fragments/vague_definitions_fuzzywobbly.inc.qmd >}}


{{< include fragments/vague_definitions_quiz.inc.qmd >}}
